task_description: Phase 42 FEAT-005: Implement voice command grammar, custom shortcuts (verbal macros), alias registry, intent parser, and command executor in the device-control package. Supports English + Hindi/Hinglish commands, user-defined aliases, multi-step shortcut sequences.

verification.summary: Typecheck passes cleanly. All 136 tests pass (21 test files, 28 new tests in 5 new test files). Source code: 363 LOC in voice/, test code: 270 LOC. Two review passes completed - all issues resolved. Pre-compiled regex in both alias registry and grammar, tier-based confirmation with configurable bypass, proper error messaging for unsupported capabilities.
